---
title: Rafael Magalhães
about:
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile_rounded.png
  image-width: 18rem
  image-shape: "rectangle"
  links:
    - icon: envelope-fill 
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rnunesmagalhaes@gmail.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rmagalhães
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/rnmag
---

Hi! Data scientist and Machine Learning Engineer trained as a quantitative social scientist. I am passionate about telling stories with data, and have a keen interest in statistical modeling and visualization.

Currently acting as an independent consultant, I have also accumulated experience managing data science teams. Main strengths in this role include strategic advising and facilitating communication between technical talent and decision makers.

I have taught several courses on quantitative methods for the social sciences. You might be interested in my materials on causal inference, on graduate linear modeling, or on undergraduate data science for the social sciences. 

Every project teaches you something, stretches you more than you expect. They’re smart, hardworking, creative, and genuinely good people. I’m grateful our paths crossed.

questions we ask ourselves all the time in model development and forecast evaluation

consulting create packages for internal use -> incluir Prophet no CV, tb falar que build for teams
